items.title: 180° Panoramic Bay Views
items.text: Every residence is oriented to capture sweeping views of the Thane Creek, mangroves, and the Kharghar Hills.

items.title: Private Lift Lobbies
items.text: Dedicated lift foyers for select floors ensure complete privacy and security for residents.

items.title: Double-Height Grand Lobby
items.text: A dramatic 7-metre entrance lobby finished in imported marble creates a lasting first impression.

items.title: Vastu-Compliant Layouts
items.text: All floor plans are designed in accordance with Vastu Shastra principles for harmony and well-being.

items.title: 3.15m Floor-to-Floor Height
items.text: Generous ceiling heights create an airy, spacious feeling throughout every room in every residence.

items.title: Green-Certified Building
items.text: Designed to meet IGBC Gold standards with solar energy, rainwater harvesting, and EV infrastructure.
